nasb.text: Behold, he was honored among the thirty, but he did not attain to the three; and David appointed him over his guard.

esv.text: He was renowned among the thirty, but he did not attain to the three. And David set him over his bodyguard.

cnv.text: 他比那三十個勇士更有聲望，只是還不及前三個勇士。大衛立他作侍衛長。

ccb.text: 比那三十个勇士更有声望，只是不及前三位勇士。大卫派他做护卫长。
